Defines the UriError built-in object with its properties for the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This C header file defines macros and properties related to the `UriError` built-in object, which is part of an ECMAScript engine implementation. It specifies an object identifier for `UriError` using the `OBJECT_ID` macro and defines a number property for the `length` attribute with a fixed property attribute using the `NUMBER_VALUE` macro. Additionally, it sets an object property for the `prototype` of `UriError` using the `OBJECT_VALUE` macro. The file uses conditional compilation to ensure that the macros are defined only if they are not already defined, and it concludes by undefining these macros to prevent conflicts with other parts of the code.
